asset_types.label: Applies to asset types
asset_types.help: This make appears when creating assets of the selected types only.

brand_key.label: Catalog brand key
brand_key.description: Matches inventory database boat_make.slug when sourced from the manufacturer list

is_custom.label: Custom Make
is_custom.help: Check if this is a custom boat make

use_default_logo.label: Use catalog logo
use_default_logo.help: When enabled, uses the shared inventory brand logo for this manufacturer.

custom_logo_id.label: Custom logo
custom_logo_id.help: Upload your own brand logo (max 2MB, JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP)

active.label: Active
active.help: Uncheck to mark the make as inactive

vendor_id.label: Default vendor
vendor_id.help: Used when importing inventory from this brand's documents and creating bills.
